ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign creator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign subcategory */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the campaign */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "launched_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ends */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is spotlighted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used for the campaign */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campaign (e.g., city, state) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign's video */,
  "total_backers" INTEGER /* Total number of backers for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the creator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the creator */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the creator's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the creator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the creator account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pledge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pledge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_price" INTEGER /* Price of the reward */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Number of available rewards */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of reward delivery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pledge */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_pledge_id FOREIGN KEY ("pledge_id") REFERENCES pledges ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of any images associated with the update */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of any videos associated with the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* ID of the update */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of any images associated with the comment */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of any videos associated with the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES campaign_updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the currency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the currency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment gateway was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment gateway was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
